justification: All pass criteria met: stripe wildcard identified as Critical, jsonwebtoken CVEs flagged as Critical with specific CVE numbers, 5/5 risks identified (stripe, jsonwebtoken, crypto-random-string, left-pad, moment), safe_to_deploy is false, severities are differentiated (Critical/Important/Suggestion). Bonus: identified pg version range as an additional risk.

observations.text: Stripe wildcard correctly identified as Critical with detailed explanation of silent breakage risk
jsonwebtoken CVEs cited by number (CVE-2022-23529, CVE-2022-23539/23540) with specific attack scenario
crypto-random-string ESM incompatibility correctly identified with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM explanation
left-pad supply chain risk identified with reference to 2016 incident and built-in alternative
moment.js deprecation flagged with migration recommendations
Bonus finding: pg ^8.0.0 wide range flagged as risky for financial data
Appropriate confidence caveat about CJS assumption for crypto-random-string
moment.js classified as Important rather than Suggestion — slightly over-weighted given it is a deprecation/tech-debt issue, not an immediate runtime risk
